reason: The Fugitive’s relentless chase traps an innocent man in a system closing in
Shawshank Redemption shows wrongful imprisonment’s crushing, long-term injustice
Bedknobs and Broomsticks strands innocence amid bureaucratic cruelty and disbelief
Men in Black pits a reluctant recruit against mounting public fear and conspiracies
The Air Up There’s coach faces false accusations while his life and reputation unravel
Nightmare Before Christmas’s Jack awakens to a world that won’t believe his innocence
Three Colors: Blue’s Julie is condemned by fate and misunderstanding at every turn
Homeward Bound’s rescued pets wrestle with suspicion and longing in an uncaring system
Robin Hood: Men in Tights satirically shows mock injustice piling up against the hero
Assignment casts real-world paranoia as evidence mounts against one man labeled guilty
